query:
SELECT u.name AS engineer_name, psd.station_code, COUNT(*) AS detail_count, ROUND(SUM(psd.earned_points), 4) AS station_points, COUNT(DISTINCT psd.station_event_id) AS unique_events
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN user u ON u.id = psd.user_id
WHERE u.name IN ('宥凱','小周')
  AND psd.work_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND psd.work_date < DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY u.name, psd.station_code
ORDER BY u.name, psd.station_code;

SELECT u.name AS engineer_name, ROUND(SUM(psd.earned_points), 4) AS total_detail_points, COUNT(*) AS total_details, COUNT(DISTINCT psd.station_event_id) AS unique_events
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN user u ON u.id = psd.user_id
WHERE u.name IN ('宥凱','小周')
  AND psd.work_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND psd.work_date < DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY u.name;

SELECT u.name AS engineer_name, edp.work_date, ROUND(edp.total_points,4) AS total_points, ROUND(edp.final_kpi_score,4) AS final_kpi_score, ROUND(edp.raw_achievement_rate,4) AS raw_achievement_rate, ROUND(edp.avg_process_hours,4) AS avg_process_hours
FROM engineer_daily_productivity edp
JOIN user u ON u.id = edp.user_id
WHERE u.name IN ('宥凱','小周')
  AND edp.work_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND edp.work_date < DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY u.name, edp.work_date;
